narrative:
Perry Twp. township has 675 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
